notes: Music-as-arena rewrite. Audio analyzer rebuilt with HPSS source separation, tempo prior, and Krumhansl-Schmuckler key estimation — beats and key changes are dramatically more accurate. Floor torn out and replaced with 9 horizontal scrolling waveform lines tinted to the current key, scrolling at BPM. Border now has a glowing scanner dot racing around the perimeter once per bar. Pulse rings emanate from arena center on every downbeat plus a big colored ring on every key change. Walls pulse-scale 1.0→1.06 on kicks/downbeats, halo 22px on kick. Player + bot ships also breathe on every kick. Bullets fatten on kicks. Camera zoom-breathes 0.78–0.90 with the music. Bloom intensity rides RMS so loud moments saturate, quiet ones stay clean. Track-selection carousel cards rebuilt — under-pointer card auto-scales bigger, gets accent gradient bg + outer halo + thicker border + larger title.
